The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as a key catalyst driving XRP's April 2026 surge, with the token gaining nearly 10% in the past week to break above $1.50 before settling at ~$1.42, signaling a fundamental shift in market sentiment.[1]

The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, with Donovan Mitchell scoring 30 points and James Harden adding 28 points[2][4]. The Raptors now trail 0-2 heading back to Toronto for Game 3 on Thursday, April 23[2][4].
